programme.title: Joseph e Speedwagon conhecem Caesar, neto de Zeppeli, quando chegam a Roma após a descoberta de que existem outros Homens do Pilar.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: O Homem do Pilar Wamuu fere Caesar Zeppeli durante uma luta feroz. Joseph revela a nova técnica que desenvolveu em segredo.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Caesar leva Joseph até Veneza para conhecer sua mentora Lisa Lisa, que começa a treiná-lo com rigor para aprender a controlar seus poderes.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Lisa Lisa diz a Joseph que ele precisa da pedra chamada Super Aja para destruir os Homens do Pilar. Joseph e Caesar enfrentam outros mestres.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Joseph e Caesar combinam seus poderes e enfrentam o Homem do Pilar que tomou o corpo de Suzi Q para roubar a Pedra Vermelha de Aja.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Stroheim luta com Kars em seu novo corpo mecânico. Joseph e Kars caem de um precipício na tentativa de conseguir a Pedra Vermelha.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Caesar chega ao esconderijo do inimigo, e agora ele tem um novo tipo de ataque. Lisa Lisa revela seu passado a Joseph.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Lisa Lisa e Joseph descobrem que Wamuu e Kars esperam por eles no hotel com uma centena de vampiros aliados, e ela elabora um plano inteligente para tirá-los dali.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Em uma arena antiga, Joseph e Wamuu disputam uma corrida de bigas até a morte. Mesmo escolhendo a primeira arma, Joseph se vê em uma situação perigosa.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Joseph usa a bandana de Caesar para se defender do ataque final de Wamuu. Lisa Lisa desafia Kars para um combate nas ruínas do templo.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Joseph tenta impedir que Lisa Lisa sofra uma queda mortal. Speedwagon revela detalhes sobre o passado de Lisa Lisa.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: A Pedra Vermelha deixa Kars praticamente invencível. Joseph planeja atrair Kars para um vulcão e acabar com ele por lá.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Kars surge da lava derretida e ataca Joseph, que instintivamente segura a Pedra Vermelha para se proteger dos golpes do inimigo.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: O ano é 1987. Joseph vai até o Japão quando descobre que seu neto Jotaro alega estar possuído por espíritos malignos e se recusa a sair da cela.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.sub-title: O homem possuído por um espírito maligno

programme.title: Jotaro volta à vida normal, mas esconde o que Joseph chama de "Stand". A caminho da escola, o mesmo Jotaro se machuca e conhece um aluno chamado Kakyoin.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Jotaro ignora os protestos de Joseph e tenta usar seu Stand para impedir que DIO continue controlando o cérebro de Kakyoin.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Kakyoin ataca um Stand sem saber quem é o seu usuário. Jotaro e seus aliados encontram um dos assassinos a mando de DIO no voo para o Egito.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: A vitória parece certa quando Avdol usa seus poderes contra o assassino Polnareff, que tem a mente controlada por DIO. Quem será o vencedor desta batalha?
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Jotaro e seus aliados viajam até Singapura pelo mar. Um Stand com usuário desconhecido ataca Jotaro assim que um passageiro clandestino é encontrado no navio.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: O grupo de Jotaro encontra um orangotango em um cargueiro que parece abandonado. Durante uma busca no barco, eles se deparam com algo misterioso.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: O grupo de Jotaro chega ao hotel em Singapura, mas Polnareff cai direto na armadilha de um usuário de Stand ao entrar no quarto.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Jotaro começa a desconfiar que Kakyoin esteja possuído quando ele age de modo estranho e espanca brutalmente um ladrão em Singapura.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Polnareff parte sozinho para vingar a irmã depois de ser atacado por um estranho Stand que só pode ser visto no reflexo de um espelho.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.sub-title: O Imperador e o Enforcado – Parte 1

programme.sub-title: O Imperador e o Enforcado – Parte 2

programme.title: Algo estranho está crescendo no braço de Joseph. Quando um médico tenta retirá-lo, um rosto aparece no tumor e declara ser um Stand.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Jotaro e seu grupo ultrapassam um carro em uma estrada nas montanhas. Logo em seguida, Polnareff vê um caminhão no sentido contrário. Será que vai dar tempo de desviar?
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Jotaro e seus aliados desconfiam que exista um Stand por perto quando encontram um cadáver em uma tranquila cidade do Paquistão.
programme.desc: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Demolidor - O Homem sem Medo, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: Um homem cegado por resíduos tóxicos, que também ampliaram os seus outros sentidos, luta contra o crime como um super-herói acrobático das artes marciais.

programme.title: Deus da guerra, (2017, Adventure)
programme.desc: Na dinastia Ming, onde o jovem general Qi Jiguang conquista uma importante vitória contra os piratas japoneses, comandando o exército chinês. Quando, quatro anos depois, sua nação é mais uma vez atacada, Qi se vê obrigado a retornar aos campos de batalha.

programme.title: Thor: Deus do Trovão, (2022, Adventure)
programme.desc: O inescrupuloso Loki escapou de Asgard e está à procura de Yggdrasil, a árvore que contém toda a força do universo. Ele planeja destruí-la e replantá-la à sua imagem e semelhança.

programme.title: Motoqueiro Fantasma: Espírito de Vingança, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Nove anos após se transformar no temido Motoqueiro Fantasma, Johnny Blaze se refugia para tentar controlar sua maldição e deixá-la escondida da maioria das pessoas. Ele leva uma vida solitária, até ser obrigado a entrar em ação novamente.

programme.title: A Tumba do Dragão, (2014, Adventure)
programme.desc: Travis Preston e sua equipe viajam para a China em busca de uma resposta para os misteriosos assassinatos que começam a levantar suspeitas sobre a existência de uma criatura lendária.

programme.title: Missao Quase Impossível, (2010, Action)
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. espião Bob Ho assume sua tarefa mais difícil até hoje: cuidar dos três filhos de sua namorada, que não gostaram muito do namorado de sua mãe.

programme.title: O Fantasma, (1996, Adventure)
programme.desc: A história começa como uma expedição à ilha de Bengalla, buscando as Caveiras de Touganda. Devido à sua enorme energia, elas podem ser desastrosas para a raça humana. Agora, o mal encontrou rival à altura e a aventura ganhou um nome: Fantasma!

programme.title: Demolidor - O Homem sem Medo, (2003, Action)
programme.desc: Um homem cegado por resíduos tóxicos, que também ampliaram os seus outros sentidos, luta contra o crime como um super-herói acrobático das artes marciais.

programme.title: As Tartarugas Ninja 3, (1991, Adventure)
programme.desc: Um cetro mágico leva April para o Japão antigo. As Tartarugas Ninja viajam no tempo para salvá-la, mas Michelangelo se perde. Donatello, Raphael e Leonardo ajudam uma vila contra o malvado Lorde Norinaga.

programme.title: O Legado do Grande Mestre, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Mantendo-se discreto depois de ter sido derrotado por Ip Man, Cheung Tin Chi mete-se em sarilhos depois de se envolver numa luta com um estrangeiro poderoso.

programme.title: Cão de briga, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: Criado por um mafioso (Hoskins) como um animal para ser uma máquina de matar, (Jet Li) é campeão de lutas clandestinas que ajuda pianista cego (Freeman) perseguido por criminosos.

programme.title: Ninja, (2010, Action)
programme.desc: Casey é um garoto apaixonado pela filosofia ninja, ele o leva ao Japão para estudar Ninjutsu. Sua instrução progride e seu sensei o envia para Nova York para proteger o lendário Yoroi Bitsu, um baú blindado contendo as armas do último Ninja Koga.

programme.title: Samurai X, (2012, Action)
programme.desc: Um ex-assassino que resolveu nunca mais matar tem seu voto duramente testado.

programme.title: Punhos da Vingança, (2021, Action)
programme.desc: Em Xangai, um ex-campeão de artes marciais mistas e herdeiro de uma corporação multibilionária, se junta a uma informante da polícia, para investigar a morte de seu irmão assassinado em um torneio de boxe underground

programme.title: O Legado do Grande Mestre, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Mantendo-se discreto depois de ter sido derrotado por Ip Man, Cheung Tin Chi mete-se em sarilhos depois de se envolver numa luta com um estrangeiro poderoso.

programme.title: Cão de briga, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: Criado por um mafioso (Hoskins) como um animal para ser uma máquina de matar, (Jet Li) é campeão de lutas clandestinas que ajuda pianista cego (Freeman) perseguido por criminosos.

programme.title: Era uma vez na China 3, (1992, Action)
programme.desc: Mestre Wong e seus discípulos entram na 'Competição de Leão Dançante' para deter um plano de assassinato e enfrentar um oponente arrogante.

programme.title: Retroceder Nunca, Render-se Jamais, (1986, Action)
programme.desc: Jason Stillwell é um fã de Bruce Lee e jovem aprendiz de artes marciais. Após seu pai negar participar de uma gangue de criminosos, eles se mudam de cidade, onde Jason encontrará problemas.

programme.title: Alfie, (1966, Romance)
programme.desc: Alfie is not really a bad sort. It’s just that he has this overwhelming desire for the opposite sex. You might say that “birds’ are irresistible to him, sort of second nature.

programme.title: The Italian Job, (1969, Thriller)
programme.desc: Charlie is out of jail and on the make with a plan for the heist of the century. Aided by top criminal mastermind Mr Bridger, Charlie sets off with a team of villains and to lift $4,000,000 from under the noses of the Turin Polizei.

programme.title: Battle of Britain, (1969, War)
programme.desc: A stellar cast, including Michael Caine, Laurence Olivier and Christopher Plummer highlights this epic telling of the greatest air battle in history, when the outnumbered Royal Air Force defeated the German Luftwaffe, saving England from invasion.

programme.title: Billion Dollar Brain, (1967, Thriller)
programme.desc: A billionaire, intent on destroying Communism by starting a world war, is close to achieving his goal with the help of the world's largest, and most powerful, computer. Secret Agent Harry Palmer (Michael Caine) is the only man who can stop him!

programme.title: House On Haunted Hill, (1959, Horror)
programme.desc: A millionaire offers $10,000 to five people who agree to be locked in a large, spooky, rented house overnight with him and his wife.

programme.title: Carnival of Souls, (1962, Horror)
programme.desc: After a traumatic accident, a woman becomes drawn to a mysterious abandoned carnival.

programme.title: My Friend Irma, (1949, Comedy)
programme.desc: A slapsticky saga related by a comparatively bright brunette dishing the dirt about her dumb blonde roommate. Dean Martin and Jerry Lewis's movie debut.

programme.title: My Friend Irma Goes West, (1950, Comedy)
programme.desc: Singer Steve, friend Seymour and fiance Jane, along with her dizzy blonde room mate Irma, have a series of misadventures on a California-bound train and end up involved with a gang of murderous gangsters in Las Vegas.

programme.title: That's My Boy, (1951, Comedy)
programme.desc: An athletic father tries to press his hypochondriac teenage son to follow in his footsteps.

programme.title: Olympus Has Fallen, (2013, Adventure)
programme.desc: Secret Service agent Mike Banning finds himself trapped inside the White House in the wake of a terrorist attack and works to rescue the President from his kidnappers.

programme.title: London Has Fallen, (2016, Adventure)

programme.title: Killer Elite, (2011, Action)

programme.title: The Lost City, (2022, Comedy)

programme.title: Apocalypto, (2006, Action)

programme.title: Crank, (2006, Action)
programme.desc: Today is the last day of hit man Chev Chelios' life. He has been given a poison that will kill him if he allows his heart to settle into a normal rhythm. In order to stay alive and take revenge, Chev must keep his adrenaline elevated by any way possible.

programme.title: Paycheck, (2003, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Michael Jennings works on top-secret projects. After each job, his memory is erased. After his latest assignment, he is shocked to be told that he agreed to forfeit all payment, until he receives an envelope containing clues to his forgotten past.

programme.title: The Last Stand, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger stars as a small border-town sheriff who makes a defiant stand to stop a fugitive on the run from the FBI.

programme.title: Scream 3, (2000, Horror)
programme.desc: The first film set the rules. In the sequel, the stakes got higher. In the third installment of the hit franchise SCREAM, all bets are off. It's an insidious game of horror movie mayhem with surprising twists and turns.

programme.title: Scream, (1996, Horror)
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths, an offbeat group of scary movie fans become the target of a masked killer in this smash-hit thriller from legendary director Wes Craven (A NIGHTMARE ON ELM STREET) that breathed new life into the horror genre.

programme.title: Scream, (2022, Horror)
programme.desc: Twenty-five years after a streak of brutal murders shocked the quiet town of Woodsboro, a terrifying new killer resurrects the Ghostface mask.

programme.title: Scream VI, (2023, Horror)
programme.desc: The four Woodsboro survivors have moved to New York City for a fresh start. Just as they begin to feel safe again, they receive that infamous call. Ghostface reemerges more brutal and relentless than ever, stopping at nothing to hunt them down.

programme.title: Scream, (1996, Horror)
programme.desc: After a series of mysterious deaths, an offbeat group of scary movie fans become the target of a masked killer in this smash-hit thriller from legendary director Wes Craven (A NIGHTMARE ON ELM STREET) that breathed new life into the horror genre.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Solving the mystery of Requiem, Diavolo takes control of Trish’s soul and steals the arrow. Attacks do nothing against Emperor Crimson’s time leaps and Eulogy’s predictions. But just as Diavolo is about to pierce his own Stand with the arrow...

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Righteous actions born of truth shall never be destroyed. Piercing Golden Wind with the arrow, Giorno draws the final battle against Diavolo to a close. And Diavolo, robbed of the mercy of death, spirals violently into an “end” that never ends.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Months before meeting Giorno, Bucciarati and gang help a local florist chisel out the truth behind his daughter’s apparent suicide. Mista is assigned to track down her lover, whose ties with destiny had unwittingly cast a light upon Bucciarati’s fate.

programme.desc: Proctors Menchi and Buhara's test consists of preparing a dish that will satisfy the palate of Gourmet Hunters.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Jonathan and his new comrade, Speedwagon, confront Dio but are caught off guard when a savage reversal sends shock waves through the Joestar family.

programme.title: Book Club, (2018, Comedy)

programme.title: Clueless, (1995, Romance)
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: Mean Girls, (2004, Screwball)

programme.title: As Good as It Gets, (1997, Dramedy)

programme.title: Who Gets the Dog?, (2016, Screwball)
programme.desc: A couple going through a divorce squabble over custody of their beloved dog.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny, (1991, Romance)
programme.desc: Michelle Pfeiffer plays Frankie, a waitress at a N.Y.C. coffee shop. After a series of hurtful relationships, the last thing Frankie’s looking for is a new man...until he comes looking for her.

programme.title: Clueless, (1995, Romance)
programme.desc: A US West Coast teen lifestyle parody centered around Cher, a popular high school girl who spends her days playing match-maker, helping her friends with fashion choices, and looking for a boyfriend.

programme.title: Cruel Intentions, (1999, Romance)
programme.desc: Two vicious step-siblings of an elite Manhattan prep school make a wager: to deflower the new headmaster's daughter before the start of term.

programme.title: She's The Man, (2006, Screwball)
programme.desc: The laughs are non-stop when Viola, disguised as her twin brother, Sebastian, joins the high school boy's soccer team and helps win the big game while unexpectedly falling for Duke, the hot star forward.

programme.title: Jump IN, (2013, Independent Drama)

programme.title: Get Over It, (2001, Romance)
programme.desc: When a popular high school basketball star gets dumped by his girlfriend, he desperately does anything to get her back. With the help of his best friend's sister, he joins the same school musical as his ex... resulting in an inevitable love triangle.

programme.title: Striking Distance, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: Coming from a police family, Tom Hardy ends up fighting his uncle after the murder of his father. Tom believes the killer is another cop and goes on the record with his allegations. Demoted then to river duty, the killer taunts Tom.

programme.title: Jagged Edge, (1985, Thriller)
programme.desc: A grisly homicide, a sensational trial, a forbidden affair it's JAGGED EDGE, a razor-sharp suspense thriller about crime, punishment and passion. Jeff Bridges is the prime suspect and Glenn Close plays the attorney who falls in love with him. rated -R

programme.title: Collateral, (2004, Action)
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and no results. On this fateful night, Max has to transport Vincent on his next job - one night, five stops, five hits and a getaway.

programme.title: Lord of War, (2005, Action)
programme.desc: Oscar winner Nicolas Cage stars in this taut, action-packed tale of a notorious arms dealer who sold weapons to dictators and successfully outran the law for nearly twenty years.

programme.title: F/X, (1986, Thriller)
programme.desc: Rollie Tyler, a movie special-effects man, accepts $30,000 from the Justice Department's Witness Relocation Program to stage the fake assassination of a mob figure who has agreed to name names.

programme.title: Collateral, (2004, Action)
programme.desc: Vincent is a cool, calculating contract killer at the top of his game. Max is a cabbie with big dreams and no results. On this fateful night, Max has to transport Vincent on his next job - one night, five stops, five hits and a getaway.

programme.title: Lucky Number Slevin, (2006, Thriller)
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity lands Slevin into the middle of a war being plotted by two of the city's most rival crime bosses: The Rabbi and The Boss.

programme.title: Limitless, (2011, Thriller)
programme.desc: A mysterious pill that enables the user to access 100% of his brain's abilities transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard, but it also puts him in a new world with many dangers.

programme.title: The Cider House Rules, (1999, Drama)
programme.desc: The Oscar-winning audience favorite of a man searching for a sense of belonging. Adapted from the screen from his bestselling novel, John Irving's powerful lesson about life, love, and home earned raves from critics and moviegoers everywhere.

programme.title: The Quiet American, (2002, Thriller)

programme.title: Hannah And Her Sisters, (1986, Comedy)

programme.title: Little Voice, (1998, Best of British Humor)
programme.desc: In an inspirational story about a painfully shy young woman and how the power of music leads her to an amazing transformation!

programme.title: Titanic, (1997, Romance)

programme.title: The Duel, (2016, Action)

programme.title: Grey Owl, (1999, Western)

programme.title: Wild Bill, (1995, Western)

programme.title: The Proposition, (2006, Western)
programme.desc: In this gritty Western written by acclaimed songwriter Nick Cave, a lawman (Guy Pearce) apprehends a notorious outlaw and gives him nine days to kill his older brother.

programme.title: Out of Liberty, (2019, Western)
programme.desc: n the winter of 1839, a jailer in Liberty, Missouri, has to watch over the most dangerous men in the state while they await trial. He faces two dangers: the one that comes from the prisoners and the one that lurks behind the walls of the prison.

programme.title: The Unforgiven, (1960, Western)
programme.desc: John Huston directs Audrey Hepburn in this thrilling, romantic western about a woman who becomes the target of lawless racism and brutality when it is discovered that she was born to the Kiowa tribe but secretly adopted by a white frontier family.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under, (1990, Western)
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: Texas Rangers, (2001, Western)
programme.desc: After the Civil War, Texas is at the mercy of murderous bandits. A group of unlikely heroes emerges to battle these renegade outlaws. Out-manned, they summon the courage to protect the innocent put the wrong things right in their beloved homeland.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Out of the Shadows, (2016, Science fiction)

programme.title: Cloverfield, (2007, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Five young New Yorkers face a life or death struggle in order to escape from the city when a monster the size of a skyscraper suddenly appears.

programme.title: Clockstoppers, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A teenager (Jesse Bradford) accidentally activates a wristwatch that allows him to make time stand still.

programme.title: Aeon Flux, (2005, Thriller)
programme.desc: Academy Award-winner Charlize Theron stars as Aeon Flux, the underground operative fighting totalitarian rule in 25th-century Earth's last living city.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin, (2011, Adventure)
programme.desc: Tintin and his friends discover directions to a sunken ship commanded by Capt. Haddock's ancestor and go off on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Monster Trucks, (2017, Adventure)
programme.desc: When high school senior Tripp discovers a gas-guzzling creature named Creech, the unlikely duo team up for a fun-filled, hilarious and heartfelt adventure in a real-life super-powered Monster Truck to reunite Creech with his family.

programme.title: Beowulf, (2007, Science fiction)
programme.desc: After Beowulf, the mightiest warrior of all, destroyes the overpowering demon Grendel, he incurs wrath of the beast's mother to seek out revenge.

programme.title: Ne Zha, (2019, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A young boy, with the power to destroy the world, must choose between good and evil in order to break the shackles of fate and become the hero.

programme.title: Coraline, (2009, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Coraline Jones discovers a secret world that's like her own, but better! When her Other Mother tries to keep her, Coraline must be brave to get home.

programme.title: Catch and Release, (2007, Comedy)
programme.desc: Gray Wheeler just lost everything. But it could be the best thing that ever happened to her. After the death of her fiancé, Gray moves in with her late love's best friends. While Sam and Dennis do their best to cheer Gray up. Rated: PG-13

programme.title: Mother's Day, (2016, Romance)
programme.desc: From the director of Pretty Woman comes a feel-good comedy about the intersecting lives of four families over a crazy week leading up to Mother's Day.

programme.title: Sense and Sensibility, (1995, Romance)
programme.desc: Emma Thompson stars in the captivating romance based on Jane Austen's classic novel of two sisters' search for love in strict Victorian society.

programme.title: 20th Century Women, (2017, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: A strong-willed single mother (Annette Bening) raises her teenage son with the help of two unconventional younger women (Elle Fanning, Greta Gerwig) in this look at a makeshift family's comic adventures in Santa Barbara during the summer of 1979.

programme.title: The Kill Room, (2023, Comedy)
programme.desc: A hitman, his boss, an art dealer and a money-laundering scheme that accidentally turns the assassin into an overnight avant-garde sensation, one that forces her to play the art world against the underworld.

programme.title: Troop Beverly Hills, (1989, Screwball)
programme.desc: Shelley Long discovers that when the going gets tough, the tough go camping in Troop Beverly Hills, a comedy about the lifestyles of the rich and outrageous. rated - PG

programme.title: Inside Llewyn Davis, (2013, Dramedy)
programme.desc: Inside Llewyn Davis follows a young folk singer as he navigates the Greenwich Village folk scene of 1961. Llewyn Davis (Oscar Isaac) is struggling to make it as a musician against seemling insurmountable obstacles - some of them of his own making.

programme.title: Ex Machina, (2015, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A young programmer (Domhnall Gleeson) at an internet company is chosen by a reclusive CEO (Oscar Isaac) to evaluate the capabilities and consciousness of a beautiful and sophisticated robot (Alicia Vikander).

programme.title: Masters Of The Universe, (1987, Science fiction)
programme.desc: The fantastic exploits of He-Man and his arch rival, the evil Skeletor, are brought to the big screen for the first time in this live-action adventure.

programme.title: Dragonslayer, (1981, Science fiction)
programme.desc: The young wizarding apprentice Galen, is sent to kill a dragon which has been devouring girls from a nearby kingdom. Will his magic be enough to save him?

programme.title: Solarbabies, (1986, Science fiction)
programme.desc: This futuristic tale features the top talents of Hollywood's new generation including Jami Gertz, Lukas Haas and Jason Patric as prisoners in a fortress who plan their dazzling escape on wheels.

programme.title: The Sword And The Sorcerer, (1982, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A mercenary with a three-bladed sword rediscovers his royal heritage's dangerous future when he is recruited to help a princess foil the designs of a brutal tyrant and a powerful sorcerer in conquering a land.

programme.title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey, (2022, Horror)
programme.desc: Winnie-The-Pooh: Blood and Honey follows Pooh and Piglet as they go on a rampage after Christopher Robin abandons them.

programme.title: Succubus, (2024, Horror)
programme.desc: A new father struggling with fatigue, emotional insecurities, and a failing marriage joins a dating app, only to swipe right on what may be an inhuman presence.

programme.title: Ichi The Killer, (2017, Thriller)
programme.desc: A notoriously sadistic yakuza enforcer's search for his boss’ killer brings him into the orbit of a demented costumed assassin known as Ichi.

programme.title: Lady Vengeance, (2005, Foreign Drama)
programme.desc: A man is wrongfully convicted for kidnapping and murdering a young child.

programme.title: The Host (2005), (2007, Horror)
programme.desc: When a young girl is snatched away from her father by a horrifying giant monster that emerges from the River Han to wreak havoc on Seoul, her entire family sets out to locate the beast and bring their little girl back home to safety.

programme.title: Don't Be Afraid of the Dark, (2010, Horror)
programme.desc: Sally moves to Rhode Island to live with her father and his new girlfriend in their 19th-century mansion. While exploring the house, Sally starts to hear voices coming from creatures in the basement whose hidden agenda is to claim her as one of their own.

programme.title: Vacancy, (2007, Horror)
programme.desc: A suspenseful, classic thriller, in the tradition of Alfred Hitchcock, starring Luke Wilson and Kate Beckinsale, that will keep you on the edge of your seat and your heart pounding! Rated: R

programme.title: Silent Hill, (2005, Horror)
programme.desc: Based on the best-selling horror action game, Silent Hill stars Radha Mitchell (Man on Fire) as Rose, a desperate mother who takes her adopted daughter, Sharon, to the town of Silent Hill in an attempt to cure her of her ailment. Rating: R

programme.title: Silent Hill: Revelation, (2012, Horror)
programme.desc: Heather Mason and her father have always tried to stay one step ahead of the malevolent forces intent on their destruction. But on the eve of her 18th birthday, a dangerous revelation leads her deeper into a demonic world.

programme.title: Terrifier, (2018, Horror)
programme.desc: Art The Clown sets his sights on three young women, along with anyone else that gets in his way.

programme.title: Terrifier 2, (2022, Horror)
programme.desc: After being resurrected by a sinister entity, Art the Clown returns to Miles County where he begins to target a teenage girl and her younger brother on Halloween.

programme.title: The Innkeepers, (2011, Horror)
programme.desc: After over one hundred years of service, The Yankee Pedlar Inn is shutting its doors for good. The last remaining employees - Claire and Luke - are determined to uncover proof of what many believe to be one of New England's most haunted hotels.

programme.title: Hell House LLC., (2016, Horror)
programme.desc: Five years after an unexplained malfunction causes the death of 15 tour-goers and staff on the opening night of a Halloween haunted house tour, a documentary crew travels back to the scene of the tragedy to find out what really happened.

programme.title: Dirty Rotten Scoundrels, (2017, Comedy)
programme.desc: The south of France. Two rival con men -- one is suave and sophisticated, the other is a third-rate American hustler -- make a wager.

programme.title: Throw Momma From the Train, (1987, Comedy)

programme.title: Running Scared, (1967, Action)

programme.title: Blind Date, (1987, Comedy)

programme.title: Teen Witch, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: One week before her sixteenth birthday, a girl realizes that she is the descendant from one of the witches of Salem. She uses her newfound powers to snag herself the football-hero as her boyfriend and to become the most popular girl in school.

programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The New Warlord! The Legendary Whitebeard's Son Appears!

programme.title: Finally scaling the elephant's back, the Straw Hats continue their search for the other half of their crew! But the mysterious "island" on the back of the elephant may hold more danger than they bargained for, as they learn they are not alone!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Deadly Elephant Climb! A Great Adventure on the Back of the Giant Elephant!

programme.title: Luffy pushes deeper into the mysterious forest on the elephant's back, but he's treading in territory where is not welcome! Meanwhile, Usopp and the others make a startling discovery in a ruined city!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Battle Begins! Luffy vs. the Mink Tribe!

programme.title: Luffy and the others survive the Rain-Ruption and learn of its vital role in maintaining life on Zou.
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Luffy and the others are unexpectedly welcomed at the fortress and treated well by the Minks, although they have to navigate some cultural differences… And Nami starts sharing what happened to them after they left Dressrosa.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Start to Counterattack! Great Moves by the Twirly Hat Crew!

programme.title: Luffy and the others learn about the dangerous intruders who have come to Zou, and why the island is wrecked! Afterwards, Luffy's loose lips get them into trouble!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Threat Descends! The Beast Pirates, Jack!

programme.title: Duke Dogstorm - the Straw Hats finally meet the ruler of this strange land, and learn more about the battle that took place here; and the mysterious system by which the island is ruled!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The King of the Day! Duke Dogstorm Appears!

programme.title: Day turns to night as the Minks keep up their onslaught against the invading Beast Pirates! But Jack's amazing Devil Fruit power may end the elephant island once and for all!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The King of the Night! Master Cat Viper Emerges!

programme.title: Night and day, Jack faces the fury of the two sworn defenders of Zou, but while they put up a good fight, the Minks aren't able to subdue Jack, especially after he brings out his secret weapon.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Exterminated Capital! The Twirly Hat Crew Arrive!

programme.title: In the aftermath of Jack's deadly attack on the island of Zou, Chopper and Sanji rush in to save the fallen Mink Tribe - but they will need the help of Caesar to overcome the poisonous effects of the gas!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Time Limit Closes in! The Bond Between the Mink Tribe and the Crew!

programme.title: More of the dramatic happenings on Zou are revealed as we learn that Jack's pirate band were not the only visitors to the elephant island! And what about the mysterious fate of Sanji?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Delinquent Comes Home! Emperor Big Mom's Assassins!

programme.title: The mystery of Sanji's disappearance deepens as Luffy learns that Big Mom's lackeys have caught up with him and the rest - and carry with them an invitation from Big Mom that simply can't be refused!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Truth Behind the Disappearance! Sanji Gets a Startling Invitation!

programme.title: Sanji's dire situation has become clear, but instead of rallying against Big Mom's crew, he submits to go along with them to bring an end to this situation. But being separated from one of his crew is more than Luffy is willing to tolerate!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To My Buds! Sanji's Farewell Note!

programme.title: There's only one key to finding out what happened to Sanji - and Luffy and the others make their way towards finding out more about their friend's disappearance, but on their way the indigenous fauna give them trouble!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Let's Go and Meet Master Cat Viper!

programme.title: Luffy hatches a plan to help Sanji, but he'll have to go alone to avoid an all-out war with Big Mom. Meanwhile, Kin'emon and Kanjuro finally arrive at Zou, unwittingly setting the stage for the Minks' thirst for revenge!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Luffy's Decision! Sanji on the Brink of Quitting!

programme.title: The samurai have landed! And they make their way into the country of Zou unaware of the welcome they will receive by the Minks!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Volatile Situation! The Dog and the Cat and the Samurai!

programme.title: Revelations abound as the true nature of the Wano clan and their relationship with the Minks is revealed! Momonosuke's role is greater than any had imagined! But even more shocking - the visage of Raizo the Ninja!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Third One! Raizo of the Mist, the Ninja, Appears!

programme.title: The mysteries of ninjutsu enthrall the Straw Hats as Raizo, the implausible ninja, makes his true powers known! Meanwhile, a mysterious artifact points the way towards the end of the Grand Line!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Red Stone! A Guide to the One Piece!

programme.title: The mystery of the Ponegliffs is revealed - their true significance, and the story of their creation, leads closer to the Straw Hats than they might have imagined!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Land of Wano! The Kozuki Family and the Ponegliffs!

programme.title: More mysteries of the Kozuki Clan are revealed - and the samurai propose an alliance to help topple Kaido! But Luffy's response will shock the crew... and force the young daimyo to take responsibility!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Vow Between Two Men! Luffy and Kozuki Momonosuke!

programme.title: Dogstorm and Cat Viper share their story of being on the journey with Oden and Roger but are interrupted by Nami who is concerned about the sea route. Meanwhile, Jack is plotting to bring down the Mokomo Dukedom again!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Legendary Journey! The Dog and the Cat and the Pirate King!

programme.title: The plans are set! The Straw Hats divide and conquer, one group heading to save Sanji, the others to the Land of Wano! But in the final moments before their departure, the tremendous elephant island begins to quake!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The Nightmare Returns! The Invincible Jack's Fierce Attack!

programme.title: After being aggressively attacked by Jack's fleet, the monstrous Zunesha comes to life and beckons to those on its back! But can the Straw Hats understand its cry? And realize in time what the elephant island needs from them?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Battle to Defend Zou! Luffy and Zunesha!

programme.title: With the skirmish with Jack now over, the Straw Hats move on to trying to bandage the great elephant's wounds! But just as the whole island puts the plan into action, unseen danger lurks on horizon!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Save Zunesha! The Straw Hat's Rescue Operation!

programme.title: The Straw Hats and the others split up into four teams, each on different missions! Some from the Mink Tribe insist on leaving with Luffy's team! Meanwhile, Usopp makes a weapon for Nami that seems to work like magic!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Saying Goodbye and Descending from the Elephant! Setting Out to Take Back Sanji!

programme.title: Luffy's team sets out from Zou on their way to win back Sanji! But they didn't realize there is one more crewmember than they have bargained for!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To the Reverie! Princess Vivi and Princess Shirahoshi!

programme.title: Carrot stows away! And settles in with the Straw Hats as they make their way to rescue Sanji! Meanwhile, in the Sakura Kingdom, Dalton and Kureha are getting ready for the Reverie so as their former enemy in his newly-built kingdom…
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: To the Reverie! Rebecca and the Sakura Kingdom!

programme.title: News of the raid on the Revolutionary Army reaches Luffy! But that's the least of their worries as they face a storm and a sudden lack of provisions! Meanwhile, Emperor Kaido fumes with anger at the reckless generation of upstarts!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Kaido Returns! An Imminent Threat to the Worst Generation!

programme.title: Sneaking in to the Navy island facility to replenish their food supply, Luffy and the others risk being caught out in the open! Will their infamy make them easy to spot by the hotheaded Navy recruits around them?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A Hungry Front! Luffy and the Navy Rookies!

programme.title: Starship Troopers, (1997, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Courageous soldiers travel to the distant and desolate Klendathu system for the ultimate showdown between the species.

programme.title: Robocop, (1987, Action)
programme.desc: Detroit in the near future. A cop who dies in the line of duty is transformed into a crime-fighting cyborg by the corporation which now runs the police department. The only hitch: this "perfect" cop still seeks revenge on the creeps who mutilated him.

programme.title: The Mortal Instruments, (2013, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Clary's life is turned upside down when her mother is kidnapped and it's revealed that they are shadowhunters who are tasked with protecting the world from vampires, werewolves and demons. Clary must discover her talents and save her mother.

programme.title: World War Z, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: World War Z is the fast-paced, pulse-pounding epic of the potential last days of the human race. Former United Nations employee Gerry Lane (Brad Pitt) is called in to help stop the pandemic that has spread around the world.

programme.title: Robocop, (2014, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In 2028 Detroit, when Alex Murphy (Joel Kinnaman) -- a loving husband, father and good cop -- is critically injured in the line of duty, the multinational conglomerate OmniCorp sees their chance for a part-man, part-robot police officer.

programme.title: Cyborg, (1989, Science fiction)
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: Hackers, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: A neophyte hacker becomes the target of the FBI after he unknowingly taps into a high-tech embezzling scheme which could cause a horrific environmental disaster in this suspenseful drama.

programme.title: Five Card Stud, (1968, Western)
programme.desc: After a card shark is caught cheating, he is taken out and lynched by the drunkards he was playing against. Soon afterwards, the men who were in the lynch mob start being murdered, one after another; all by hanging.

programme.title: Man With The Gun, (1955, Western)
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum portrays an Exterminator--in the American West. He will, for a price, eliminate any outlaws annoying the peace of any Western town. When his wife, in disgust, leaves him, he pursues her, only to encounter his greatest gunfighting challenge.

programme.title: The Way West, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: Icons Kirk Douglas, Robert Mitchum and Richard Widmark star in this sumptuous, epic tale of the brave men and women in the U.S. who left the comfort and safety of life in the East for the promise of free land a better life in the untamed West.

programme.title: The Wonderful Country, (1959, Western)
programme.desc: In this action-packed western, ex-pat Martin Brady (Robert Mitchum) travels to Texas to broker an arms deal for Mexican Governor Castro (Pedro Armendariz). But things get complicated when the the guns he was returning to Mexico are stolen.

programme.title: Red River Valley, (1936, Western)
programme.desc: Cowhand Gene Autry and his partner, Frog Millhouse, help Arizona cattlemen who are trying to build a dam that will bring water to their parched lands. Unscrupulous businessmen attempt to hinder these plans for their own profit.

programme.title: The Singing Cowboy, (1936, Western)
programme.desc: When Gene Autry's boss is murdered, Gene becomes the guardian of his little girl. The child is seriously injured in a stable fire and needs a lifesaving brain operation!

programme.title: The Return Of A Man Called Horse, (1976, Western)
programme.desc: Richard Harris stars in this superior sequel which follows the plight of a horribly wronged tribe of Sioux Indians and the white man who would join in their revenge.

programme.title: Fort Yuma, (1955, Western)
programme.desc: When a revered Apache chief is brutally murdered en route to Fort Yuma to negotiate a peace treaty, all-out war erupts in this rousing -- and surprisingly touching -- western starring Peter Graves and directed by the legendary Lesley Selander.

programme.title: Lonesome Dove, (1989, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: Texas Rangers and long-time ranching partners Gus McCrae and Woodrow Call meet their old friend Jake, and decide to strike out from their south Texas base and drive a cattle herd to Montana.

programme.title: The Core, (2003, Science fiction)
programme.desc: The Earth has stopped rotating because of a change in the planet's core temperature. To restore the normal temperature, astronauts must travel to the center and detonate a nuclear bomb before the core superheats and destroys all life on the surface.

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: The Island, (2005, Science fiction)
programme.desc: A man goes on the run after he discovers that he is actually a "harvested being", and is being kept along with others in a utopian facility.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the others land on the moon to solve the mystery of the Legendary Silver Crystal.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Appearing before a devastated Usagi is a man who looks just like Mamoru but goes by 'Endo'. Usagi sees traces of Mamoru and thus approaches him…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon learns that Mamoru has become a soldier of the Dark Kingdom. She decides to take on Queen Beryl in an effort to get Mamoru back, but…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: To end her painful journey, Sailor Moon stabs Mamoru with the holy sword before turning it on herself.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon must destroy Queen Metalia, who radiates a tremendously dark energy. The power of the Legendary Silver Crystal is finally released.
programme.sub-title: Act.14 Conclusion and Commencement - Petite Étrangere -

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to figure out the identity of Chibi-Usa, the mysterious girl who fell from the sky.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: When Rei is abducted Usagi begins to doubt the identity of Chibi-Usa. Ami is challenged by a mysterious woman at the World Chess Conference.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others try to locate Ami and Rei. Seeing this, Mamoru's underclassman Ittou Asanuma demands to know Makoto's identity.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Minako sneaks into a channeling session to communicate with people in other dimensions and learns the channeler is Calaveras the Medium!

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the others decide to go to the 30th century, where Chibi-Usa came from. Waiting for them there is the solitary Guardian Sailor Pluto.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Mamoru's future self, King Endymion, appears before Sailor Moon and her friends. He reveals a shocking fact about Planet Earth in the future.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Captured by Dimande, Usagi loses her transformation powers. Meanwhile, Chibi-Usa feels helpless and goes to see Sailor Pluto.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi tries to escape the Black Moon Castle. She arrives at the 'Malefic Black Crystal' reactor, where she finds Dimande's younger brother Saphir.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the others continue their search for Tuxedo Mask and Chibi-Usa. But Wiseman's covert maneuvers had already begun…

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the others are stunned to learn Chibi-Usa's real identity is Black Lady. And finally, Wiseman's own identity is revealed.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Upon contact with the 'Legendary Silver Crystals,' it was Sailor Pluto who saved the world from destruction.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Death Phantom radiates an enormous dark power. Sailor Moon and Sailor Chibi Moon take a stand and release the power of the 'Legendary Silver Crystal'.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends' peace is short-lived when a strange phenomenon that turns people into monsters begins plaguing the city.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Chibi-Usa wanders into Tomoe Research Laboratory, where she finds a girl who appears to be sick.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Usagi and the girls discuss the two mysterious figures they saw, who appeared to look like Sailor Guardians.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians defeat Eudial but, still suspicious of Mugen Academy, decide to check the place out again.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Haruka and Michiru are Sailor Uranus and Sailor Neptune, but they seem uninterested in working with the other Sailor Guardians.
programme.sub-title: Act.30 Infinity 4 Haruka & Michiru - Sailor Uranus & Sailor Neptune -

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians must stop a plant called Tellu from stealing the Hostes from humans.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Sailor Uranus, Neptune and Pluto appear before Sailor Moon and the other Guardians to reveal their true agenda.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Cyprine and Ptilol of the Witches 5 have placed the Sailor Guardians under a spell that causes them to turn against one another.
programme.sub-title: Act.33 Infinity 7 Transformation - Super Sailor Moon -

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: Hotaru turns into Mistress 9 and takes Chibi-Usa’s Legendary Silver Crystal and her soul as well.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians fight their way through to find Hotaru, who is in possession of Chibi-Usa’s Silver Crystal.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: The Three Outer Guardians risk their lives to contain Master Pharaoh 90 within the Sankakusu Delta and halt his attempt to become one with the Earth.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: As Master Pharaoh 90’s power continues to grow, to protect her friends Super Sailor Moon decides to make the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Sailor Moon Crystal
programme.desc: With Super Sailor Moon gone, the remaining Sailor Guardians must helplessly watch as Sailor Saturn brings an end to the world with her Silence Glaive.

programme.title: Sailor Moon R: The Movie
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the Sailor Guardians unite to save Earth from an alien force!

programme.title: Sicario, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Recruited by Matt Graver, FBI agent Kate Macer joins a task force for the escalating war against drugs. Led by the intense Alejandro, the team travels back-and-forth across the U.S.-Mexican border, using one cartel boss to flush out a bigger one.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A rancher (Christian Bale) and the captive outlaw (Russell Crowe) in his charge learn to respect each other on a dangerous journey to catch a train.

programme.title: The Impossible, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: A couple and their three sons encounter terror, courage and compassion following the December 2004 tsunami that devastated Thailand.

programme.title: All Is Lost, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: During a solo voyage in the Indian Ocean, a veteran sailor (Robert Redford) must face the possibility of his own death after his vessel, radio and navigation equipment become damaged.

programme.title: Margin Call, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: When an analyst uncovers information that could ruin them all, the key players (Kevin Spacey, Paul Bettany) at an investment firm take extreme measures to control the damage.

programme.title: Crash, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Racial tensions collide in a collection of intertwined stories involving residents of Los Angeles.

programme.title: The King's Speech, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: An extraordinary friendship forms between England's King George VI (Colin Firth) and the Australian actor/speech therapist (Geoffrey Rush) who helps him overcome a stammer.

programme.title: La La Land, (1970, Entertainment)
programme.desc: Mia (Emma Stone), an aspiring actress, and Sebastian (Ryan Gosling), a dedicated jazz musician, are struggling to make ends meet in a city known for crushing hopes and breaking hearts.

programme.title: Mystic Pizza, (1988, Romance)
programme.desc: The coming-of-age of three best friends who work at a pizzeria in the seaside town of Mystic, Connecticut.

programme.title: Steel Magnolias, (1989, Dramedy)
programme.desc: Six divas of the silver screen - Sally Field, Dolly Parton, Shirley MacLaine, Daryl Hannah, Olympia Dukakis and Julia Roberts - come together as bosom buddies in this hilarious and heartwarming story of life, love and loss in a small Louisiana parish.

programme.title: The Mexican, (2001, Action)
programme.desc: A man tries to transport an ancient gun called The Mexican, believed to carry a curse, back across the border, while his girlfriend pressures him to give up his criminal ways.

programme.title: August: Osage County, (2013, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Meryl Streep and Julia Roberts lead an all-star cast. A family crisis unites a dispersed group of siblings at the Oklahoma house they grew up in with the dysfunctional woman who raised them.

programme.title: Free Fire, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: When a black market arms deal goes outrageously wrong, Justine (Brie Larson) finds herself caught in the crossfire, forced to navigate a warehouse full of trigger-happy madmen all hanging on for dear life in this hilarious action-comedy.

programme.title: Frankie and Johnny, (1966, Musical)
programme.desc: Join Elvis Presley and Donna Douglas for a riverboat ride of rollicking musical entertainment in this charming and sassy comic hit about a gambler and his lady love.

programme.title: Mystic Pizza, (1988, Romance)
programme.desc: The coming-of-age of three best friends who work at a pizzeria in the seaside town of Mystic, Connecticut.

programme.title: Room, (2015, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Kidnapped and confined to a windowless room, Ma uses imagination to give Jack a fulfilling life. At a breaking point, they enact a risky plan to escape which ultimately brings them face-to-face with the scariest thing yet: the real world.

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. É a história da lendária banda de rock Queen e de seu vocalista principal, Freddie Mercury, e os eventos que levaram ao seu famoso show no Live Aid em 1985. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Rami Malek, Lucy Boynton, Gwilym Lee, Ben Hardy, Joseph Mazzello Diretor: Bryan Singer

programme.title: O Regresso, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Em uma expedição de comércio de peles na década de 1820, um homem luta para sobreviver depois de ser atacado por um urso e abandonado por sua própria equipe de caça. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hardy, Domhnall Gleeson, Will Poulter, Forrest Goodluck Diretor: Alejandro G. Iñárritu

programme.title: Jogada de Risco, (1997)
programme.desc: 1997. John (John C. Reilly), um fracassado encalhado em Reno, está duro. É aí que chega Sydney, que fica com pena dele, paga um café da manhã e lhe dá algumas dicas sobre como ganhar dinheiro nos cassinos. Dois anos depois, John torna-se parceiro de Sydney. Gêneros: Crime Elenco: Philip Baker Hall, John C. Reilly, Gwyneth Paltrow, Samuel L. Jackson, F. William Parker Diretor: Paul Anderson

programme.title: A Viagem, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Uma exploração de como as ações de vidas individuais impactam umas às outras no passado, presente e futuro, como uma alma vai de assassino a herói, e um ato de bondade se espalha ao longo dos séculos para inspirar uma revolução. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Tom Hanks, Halle Berry, Susan Sarandon, Hugh Grant Diretor: Tom Tywe, Lana Wachowski

programme.title: Birdman ou (A Inesperada Virtude da Ignorância), (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. O ator Riggan Thomson é mais conhecido por seu papel no filme de mais de vinte anos atrás como o super-herói dos quadrinhos Birdman, no blockbuster de mesmo nome e suas duas sequências igualmente populares. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Michael Keaton, Emma Stone, Kenny Chin, Zach Galifianakis Diretor: Alejandro G. Iñárritu

programme.title: A Grande Aposta, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Em 2006, um grupo de investidores apostou contra o mercado hipotecário dos Estados Unidos. Esta investigação revela o quão defeituoso e corrupto é o mercado. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Ryan Gosling, Rudy Eisenzopf, Casey Groves, Charlie Talbert, Christian Bale Diretor: Adam McKay

programme.title: Ad Astra - Rumo às Estrelas, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Um astronauta viaja para os confins do sistema solar em busca de seu pai e para desvendar um mistério que ameaça a sobrevivência do planeta. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Brad Pitt, Tommy Lee Jones, Ruth Negga, Donald Sutherland, Kimberly Elise Diretor: James Gray

programme.title: Garota Exemplar, (2014)
programme.desc: 2014. Com o desaparecimento de sua esposa tornando-se o centro de um intenso circo midiático, um homem vê os holofotes voltarem-se para ele quando surge a suspeita de que ele talvez não seja inocente. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Tyler Perry, Ben Affleck, Rosamund Pike, Carrie Coon, Neil Patrick Harris Diretor: David Fincher

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. É a história da lendária banda de rock Queen e de seu vocalista principal, Freddie Mercury, e os eventos que levaram ao seu famoso show no Live Aid em 1985. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Rami Malek, Lucy Boynton, Gwilym Lee, Ben Hardy, Joseph Mazzello Diretor: Bryan Singer

programme.title: O Regresso, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Em uma expedição de comércio de peles na década de 1820, um homem luta para sobreviver depois de ser atacado por um urso e abandonado por sua própria equipe de caça. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Leonardo DiCaprio, Tom Hardy, Domhnall Gleeson, Will Poulter, Forrest Goodluck Diretor: Alejandro G. Iñárritu

programme.title: Imortais, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Teseu é um homem mortal escolhido por Zeus para liderar a luta contra o cruel rei Hiperião, que está causando estragos por toda a Grécia para obter uma arma capaz de destruir a humanidade. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Henry Cavill, Mickey Rourke, Luke Evans, Freida Pinto Diretor: Tarsem Singh

programme.title: Dose dupla, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Dois agentes especiais precisam se unir contra um cartel de drogas mexicano depois que uma operação secreta acaba gerando resultados catastróficos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Denzel Washington, Mark Wahlberg, Paula Patton Diretor: Baltasar Kormákur

programme.title: O Franco-Atirador, (2015)
programme.desc: 2015. Depois de uma longa carreira como matador de aluguel, Martin Terrier pretende se aposentar e passar o resto da vida ao lado de sua amada. Mas ele descobre que está sendo traído por pessoas de sua confiança! Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Sean Penn, Jasmine Trinca, Javier Bardem Diretor: Pierre Morel

programme.title: A Perseguição, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Ottway trabalha em um lugar isolado no Alasca. Certo dia, quando retornava à cidade para matar a saudade da esposa, o avião cai. Feridos e sem alimentos, os sobreviventes lutam pela vida e tentam reencontrar a civilização. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Liam, Neeson Diretor: Joe Carnaham

programme.title: O Anjo da Morte, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Um policial disfarçado se aproxima de seu inimigo. Ela decide deixar um agente de confiança entrar em campo, mas tem dúvidas se ela tem o que é preciso para completar a missão. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal, Sarah Lind Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: A Arma, (2023)
programme.desc: 2023. Dallas é uma máquina de matar. Seus ataques a gangues de motociclistas e laboratórios de metanfetamina irritam o chefe da máfia de Las Vegas, que sequestra sua namorada. Dallas não irá parar até que a justiça seja feita. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Tony Schiena, AnnaLynne McCord, Sean Patrick Flanery, Cuba Gooding Jr. Diretor: Tony Schiena

programme.title: Soldado Universal 3: Regeneração, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Um soldado ressuscitado e geneticamente modificado enfrenta seus inimigos, contratados por terroristas nucleares. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Van Damme, Dolph Ludgren Diretor: John Hyams

programme.title: Imortais, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Teseu é um homem mortal escolhido por Zeus para liderar a luta contra o cruel rei Hiperião, que está causando estragos por toda a Grécia para obter uma arma capaz de destruir a humanidade. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Henry Cavill, Mickey Rourke, Luke Evans, Freida Pinto Diretor: Tarsem Singh

programme.title: Sem Lei, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Um grupo de três amigos planeja um grande roubo que acaba dando errado quando um deles se revela um traidor. Enganado, Sonny decide assumir o problema de frente e busca vingança contra o antigo parceiro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Bruce, Phillippe, Ryan, Willis Diretor: Mike Gunther

programme.title: Carga Explosiva 3, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. Frank Martin é obrigado a conduzir Valentina, a filha de Leonid Vasilev, o chefe da Agência de Proteção Ambiental da Ucrânia, de Marselha a Odessa, além de dois sacos de conteúdo suspeito. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Jason Statham, Robert Knepper, Natalya Rudakova, François Berléand, Jeroen Krabbé, Alex Kobold, David Atrakchi, Yann Sundberg, Eriq Ebouaney, David Kammenos Diretor: Olivier Megaton

programme.title: Ninja, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Casey é um garoto apaixonado pela filosofia ninja, ele o leva ao Japão para estudar Ninjutsu. Sua instrução progride e seu sensei o envia para Nova York para proteger o lendário Yoroi Bitsu, um baú blindado contendo as armas do último Ninja Koga. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Scott Adkins – Tsuyoshi Ihara, Miki Hijii Diretor: Isaac Florentine

programme.title: Jogo de Espiões, (2001)
programme.desc: 2001. O agente aposentado da CIA Nathan Muir relembra como treinou Tom Bishop enquanto lutava contra a política da agência para libertá-lo de seus captores chineses. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Michael Redford, Brad Pitt, Robert Redford, Stephen Dillane, Marianne Jean-Baptiste, Matthew Marsh, Todd Boyce, Michael Paul Chan, Catherine McCormack, Larry Bryggman Diretor: Tony Scott

programme.title: Risco Absoluto, (2010)
programme.desc: 2010. Liberado após seis anos preso por um crime que não cometeu, Shane Danielsnão demora a se meter novamente em encrenca. Ele testemunha um crime e para salvar uma jovem sequestrada se envolve com a máfia chinesa, russos e policiais corruptos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Steven Seagal Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: Confusões no Lava-Jato, (2001)
programme.desc: 2001. Após começar a trabalhar em um lava-jato, Sean se vê brigando com o melhor amigo, Dee Loc, que também trabalha lá e duvida que Sean tenha sido contratado como seu supervisor. No entanto, eles logo deixam a briga de lado quando o chefe é sequestrado. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Dr. Dre, Snoop Dogg, Anthony Albano, Lamont Bentley, The Bishop Don Magic Juan, Thai Buckman, Frank Chavez, Tommy Chong, Tic, Bruce Bruce Diretor: DJ Pooh

programme.title: Perdidos em Nova York, (1999)
programme.desc: 1999. O remake da comédia de Neil Simon, de 1970, acompanha as aventuras de um casal, Henry e Nancy Clark, em Nova York, em uma maré de má sorte. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Steve Martin, Goldie Hawn, John Cleese, Mark McKinney, Oliver Hudson Diretor: Sam Weisman

programme.title: Última Viagem a Vegas, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Quatro amigos de longa data decidem parar de fingir sua idade e reviver seus dias de glória quando o solteiro inveterado do bando decide se casar. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Robert De Niro, Morgan Freeman, Michael Douglas Diretor: Jon Turteltaud

programme.title: A Promoção, (2008)
programme.desc: 2008. Dois sub-gerentes de uma rede de supermercados disputam uma promoção cobiçada. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Seann William Scott, John C. Reilly, Jason Bateman, Jenna Fischer, Bobby Cannavale, Lili Taylor Diretor: Steven Conrad

programme.title: Correndo Atrás De Um Pai, (2017)
programme.desc: 2017. Quando descobrem que a mãe (Glenn Close) sempre lhes mentiu sobre o pai biológico, os irmãos gémeos Kyle (Owen Wilson) e Peter (Ed Helms), que não têm nada em comum, decidem atravessar os Estados Unidos em busca do pai que sempre sonharam conhecer. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Owen Wilson, Ed Helms, J.k. Simmons, Terry Bradshaw, Ving Rhames, Robert Mello, Glenn Close, Zachary Haven, Retta, Ann McKenzie Diretor: Lawrence Sher

programme.title: Correndo Atrás do Diploma, (2002)
programme.desc: 2002. Shaun espera ansiosamente a resposta de Stanford, sobre seu ingresso na faculdade. Até que, para sua desilusão, é rejeitado. Descobre que houve um engano no envio de suas notas para Stanford. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Colin Hanks, Jack Black, Schuyler Fisk, John Lithgow Diretor: Jake Kasdan

programme.title: Endiabrado, (2000)
programme.desc: 2000. Um jovem desesperado para mudar de vida faz um acordo com o Diabo. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Brendan Fraser, Elizabeth Hurley, Frances O’Connor, Frances O'Connor, Paul Adelstein, Brian Doyle-Murray, Jeff Doucette, Miriam Shor, Orlando Jones, Toby Huss Diretor: Harold Ramis

programme.title: Confusões no Lava-Jato, (2001)
programme.desc: 2001. Após começar a trabalhar em um lava-jato, Sean se vê brigando com o melhor amigo, Dee Loc, que também trabalha lá e duvida que Sean tenha sido contratado como seu supervisor. No entanto, eles logo deixam a briga de lado quando o chefe é sequestrado. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Dr. Dre, Snoop Dogg, Anthony Albano, Lamont Bentley, The Bishop Don Magic Juan, Thai Buckman, Frank Chavez, Tommy Chong, Tic, Bruce Bruce Diretor: DJ Pooh

programme.title: Perdidos em Nova York, (1999)
programme.desc: 1999. O remake da comédia de Neil Simon, de 1970, acompanha as aventuras de um casal, Henry e Nancy Clark, em Nova York, em uma maré de má sorte. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Steve Martin, Goldie Hawn, John Cleese, Mark McKinney, Oliver Hudson Diretor: Sam Weisman

programme.title: Última Viagem a Vegas, (2013)
programme.desc: 2013. Quatro amigos de longa data decidem parar de fingir sua idade e reviver seus dias de glória quando o solteiro inveterado do bando decide se casar. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Robert De Niro, Morgan Freeman, Michael Douglas Diretor: Jon Turteltaud

programme.title: Negócio de Risco, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Nas ruas de Detroit, em 1974, Chris Mankowski, um especialista em explosivos, começa a lidar com dinamites para a sua próxima missão criminosa. No entanto, o que ele não espera é que sua parceria com Skip Gibbs gerará consequências extremamente violentas Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Christian Slater, Michael Jai White, Crispin Glover, Billy Burke, Breanne Racano, Sabina Gadecki, Roger Bart, Andy Dick, Gloria Hendry, Page Kennedy Diretor: Charles Matthau

programme.title: O Grande Golpe, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Uma dona de casa do Texas se torna uma assassina depois de descobrir que seu marido planeja realizar um assalto para seu próprio lucro. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Val Kilmer, Ray Liotta, Kelli Giddish Diretor: Jesse Baget

programme.title: Confusão de Elite, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. Luke, investigador GSG-10, e Theo, policial, têm que se unir quando Mascha, a filha do presidente da Moldávia, é sequestrada do Palácio de Bellevue. Em sua missão de resgate, os dois deixam um enorme rastro de devastação. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Til Schweiger, Matthias Schweighöfer, Anne Schäfe, Anne Schäfer, Lisa Tomaschewsky, Joachim Paul Assböck, Ilka Bessin, Viktor Bleischwitz, David Brückner, Simson Bubbel Diretor: Torsten Künstler

programme.title: O Matador, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. Um matador solitário forma uma improvável amizade com um empresário em crise. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Pierce Brosnan, Greg Kinnear, Hope Davis, Portia Dawson, Adam Scott, Israel Tellez, Arlin Miller, Azucena Medina, Jonah Meyerson, Wiveca Bonerais Diretor: Richard Shepard

programme.title: Sexta-Feira 13 - Parte 5: Um Novo Começo, (1985)
programme.desc: 1985. Desta vez, ele parece estar de olho nos pacientes mais jovens de um abrigo isolado. E não são poucos os jovens que aparecem aos pedaços, como mais um trabalho de Jason. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Carol Locatell, Dominick Brascia, John Shepherd, Juliette Cummins, Marco St. John, Melanie Kinnaman, Richard Young, Shavar Ross, Tiffany Helm, Vernon Washington Diretor: Danny Steinmann

programme.title: Sexta-Feira 13 Parte 6: Jason Vive, (1986)
programme.desc: 1986. Tommy Jarvis vai ao cemitério para se livrar do corpo de Jason Voorhees de uma vez por todas, mas inadvertidamente o traz de volta à vida. O recém-revivido assassino mais uma vez busca vingança, e Tommy pode ser o único que pode derrotá-lo. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: C. J. programme.title: Sexta-Feira 13 - Parte 7: A Matança Continua, (1988)
programme.desc: 1988. Desde que o maníaco Jason Voorhees foi preso nas correntes do fundo de Crystal Lake, o acampamento de verão próximo funcionou sem problemas... e sem assassinatos. Mas um dos participantes desta temporada traz consigo um segredo mortal. Gêneros: Horror Elenco: Elizabeth Kaitan, Heidi Kozak, Jennifer Banko, John Otrin, Kane Hodder, Kevin Blair, Lar Park Lincoln, Susan Blu, Terry Kiser, Kevin Spirtas Diretor: John Carl Buechler

programme.desc: 1989. A Big Apple está correndo riscos agora que o indestrutível psicopata Jason Voorhees coloca o pé na estrada. Em direção à Nova Iorque, ele promete pintar as ruas de vermelho. programme.title: A Lição do Amor, (2014)

Diretor: Michael McAlexander

programme.title: Macaco Vs. Máquina, (2023)
programme.desc: 2023. Reconhecendo o poder destrutivo de seu macaco gigante, os militares criam sua própria Inteligência Artificial pronta para a batalha, o Macaco Mecha, mas seu primeiro teste prático dá terrivelmente errado. programme.title: Temporada de Furacões, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Após o furacão Katrina, o treinador de basquete do ensino médio Al Collins reúne alunos de cinco colégios da Louisiana e os leva aos campeonatos estaduais. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Forest Whitaker, Isaiah Washington, Taraji P. Henson Diretor: Tim Story

programme.title: Em Nome do Pai, (1970)

programme.title: Top Model, (1970)

programme.title: Um Lobo em Pele de Cordeiro, (1970)

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, junto com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestra BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Beleza Fantástica, (1970)

programme.title: A Última Jornada, (1970)

programme.title: Trumbo - Lista Negra, (1970)

programme.title: Guerra Biológica, (1970)

programme.title: Além das Profundezas, (1970)

programme.title: Uma Pistola para Ringo, (1965)

programme.title: Double Dragon, (1970)

programme.title: Gata Selvagem, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Rosaura, uma jovem com problemas familiares, se assusta ao ver um pequeno avião cair. Luis Mario, filho dos Arismendi, retorna para sua família, depois de passar por uma tragédia. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Gata Selvagem, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Luis Mario fica impressionado com Rosaura; Doña Cruz, a avó de Rosaura, procura pela moça. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.desc: 1970. Eduarda, a irmã de Luís Mário, quer que ele se case com a rica Eva, uma mulher soberba que sempre o desejou. Gêneros: Entertainment
